summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of EnterprateAI new features: Notifications API (real-time notifications), A/B Testing API (create, list, start, analyze), Team Collaboration API (members, invites, activity, comments, roles), AI Website Builder API (generate, list, refine, color schemes), and TikTok & YouTube scheduling (optimal times). All 45 new tests passed. All 36 existing tests from iteration 2 also passed (no regressions).
critical_code_review_comments: All new APIs are functional and returning expected data structures
Notifications API correctly returns notifications list and unread count
A/B Testing API supports full lifecycle: create (draft) -> start (running) -> analyze (results)
A/B Testing supports all test types: campaign, landing_page, email, social_post, cta
A/B Testing supports goal metrics: conversion_rate, click_rate, engagement, revenue
Team Collaboration API supports invites, members, activity feed, and comments
Team roles endpoint returns all 5 roles: owner, admin, editor, viewer, guest (no auth required)
AI Website Builder generates HTML using AIDA framework (Attention, Interest, Desire, Action)
Website generation supports 6 color schemes: modern, professional, creative, minimal, warm, nature
Website refine endpoint increments version number correctly
TikTok scheduling returns optimal posting times with engagement predictions
YouTube scheduling returns optimal posting times with engagement predictions
MOCKED: Gemini 2.0 Flash API (website generation uses template fallback if no API key)
MOCKED: Netlify API (deployment returns simulated URL if no API key)
seed_data_creation: Created test user and workspace membership via MongoDB script in test fixture
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working. Test files: /app/tests/test_iteration3_features.py (45 tests for notifications, A/B testing, team collaboration, AI website builder, TikTok/YouTube scheduling), /app/tests/test_new_features.py (36 tests from iteration 2). Backend APIs verified: GET /api/notifications, GET /api/notifications/unread-count, POST /api/ab-tests, GET /api/ab-tests, POST /api/ab-tests/{id}/start, GET /api/ab-tests/{id}/analyze, GET /api/team/members, POST /api/team/invite, GET /api/team/activity, POST /api/team/comments, GET /api/team/roles, POST /api/websites/generate, GET /api/websites, POST /api/websites/{id}/refine, GET /api/websites/color-schemes/list, GET /api/scheduling/optimal-times?platform=tiktok, GET /api/scheduling/optimal-times?platform=youtube. Note: Gemini and Netlify APIs are MOCKED if keys not configured.

endpoints_tested: GET /api/notifications - Returns list of notifications (requires auth)
POST /api/ab-tests - Creates A/B test with id, name, status=draft, variants
GET /api/ab-tests - Returns list of A/B tests
POST /api/ab-tests/{id}/start - Starts test, status changes to running, adds startDate
GET /api/ab-tests/{id}/analyze - Returns testId, results, goalMetric, hasStatisticalSignificance
GET /api/team/members - Returns list of team members
POST /api/team/invite - Creates invite with id, email, role, status=pending
GET /api/team/activity - Returns list of team activities
POST /api/team/comments - Creates comment with id, content, entityType, entityId, userId, createdAt
GET /api/team/roles - Returns all 5 roles (no auth required)
team_collaboration_api.auth_required: Most endpoints require auth, /api/team/roles does not

endpoints_tested: POST /api/websites/generate - Generates website with id, htmlContent, status=draft
GET /api/websites/color-schemes/list - Returns 6 color schemes (no auth required)
ai_website_builder_api.auth_required: Most endpoints require auth, /api/websites/color-schemes/list does not

endpoints_tested: GET /api/scheduling/optimal-times?platform=tiktok - Returns optimal TikTok posting times
GET /api/scheduling/optimal-times?platform=youtube - Returns optimal YouTube posting times
